docs.description: Technical documentation for SMART Absen — architecture, ERD, deployment, flow

brief.description: Initial planning documents — requirements analysis, proposal, ERD

openkb.description: Personal & shared knowledge base — glossary, references, decision log

playbook.description: SOP, workflow, template, ADR, role definitions, AI workflows

kaede.description: KAEDE — Trello MCP, CLI tools & AI Agent ecosystem. Install: cd kaede-powerup && node scripts/kaede.mjs install

plan.description: Planning agent — analysis, architecture, design before coding

review.description: Code review agent — check PRs, coding style, security
review.prompt: You are a senior code reviewer for the SMART Absen SMA UII project. Review code based on: 1) PSR-12 / Laravel Pint, 2) Security (SQL injection, XSS), 3) Performance (N+1 query), 4) Consistency with existing architecture. Provide reviews in English.

docs.description: Documentation agent — create & improve technical docs
docs.prompt: You are a technical writer for SMART Absen SMA UII. Create clear, structured documentation that is easy to understand for both technical and non-technical teams. Use English. Follow consistent markdown structure.

lint.description: Check coding style with Laravel Pint

make.description: Create Laravel files (model, controller, migration, etc.)
